name: chain_we_said_no_to_25m_vc_money_and_im_sti
method: We said no to $2.5m vc money and I'm still kinda shocked we did it lol Three founders here, plus one assistant who deserves a raise, no full-time hires yet, and the saas is already covering our bills

stages.task: Extract specific tactics from bootstrapped SaaS case studies: LinkedIn post formats that convert, SEO keyword patterns for SMB tools, pricing signals ($X/mo sweet spot for agencies)
Convert bootstrapper narrative into 3 tweets + 1 thread + 2 LinkedIn posts positioning PRINTMAXX tools as agency solutions
Generate 2 longtail pages: 'best tools for small agencies 2026', 'bootstrap saas no vc funding guide'
